items.headline: Corning (GLW) Stock After 97% Rally And Recent Pullback Is The Price Still Reasonable
items.summary: Corning's stock has caught plenty of attention, and if you are wondering whether the recent price puts it above or below a reasonable value, this breakdown is aimed squarely at that question. After a strong run with the stock up 97.6% year to date and 256.8% over the past year, the recent pullback of 4.4% over the past week and 6.6% over the past month may have some investors reassessing both the upside and the risks.
